scripts.db:generate: pnpm run build && node --import tsx ./node_modules/drizzle-kit/bin.cjs generate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm run build && node --import tsx ./node_modules/drizzle-kit/bin.cjs migrate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.db:push: pnpm run build && node --import tsx ./node_modules/drizzle-kit/bin.cjs push --config drizzle.config.ts
